emails.subject: RE: Position manager
emails.body: RE: Position manager I fixed it, no idea where those megawiggles went To: Semperger, Cara

emails.subject: Position manager
emails.body: Position manager Cara, We are short 14 mws at the Portland General System in position manager for Friday, July 20th. HE 5 and HE 6. Pacificorp deal #694155 is not in for those hours. Could you look into this? Thanks, Bill

emails.subject: RE: Position manager
emails.body: Great. Thanks, B To: Williams III, Bill
